passwordReset.requestDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
passwordReset.requestSuccess: If an account exists, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
passwordReset.success: Password has been reset. You can now log in.

account.description: Create your account. It takes less than a minute.

bio.description: We use this to estimate your daily calorie needs.

body.description: Your current body data helps us calculate your baseline.

goal.description: Your goal defines how your daily target is calculated.

activity.description: Your daily movement affects your calorie needs.

feedback.verificationEmailSent: We've sent a verification link to your email.

verification.title: Verify your email
verification.success: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.

errors.invalidResetToken: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
errors.accountDeleted: Your account is deactivated. You can restore it by signing in again.
